CREATE TABLE sessions (id INT, status VARCHAR(20), data VARCHAR(255));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sessions WHERE status = 'closed';
SELECT s1.id, s1.data FROM sessions s1 JOIN sessions s2 ON s1.id = s2.id WHERE s1.status = 'open' AND s2.status = 'closed';
SELECT id, data FROM sessions WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE status='open') AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE status='closed');
INSERT INTO sessions (id, status, data) SELECT MAX(id) + 1, 'open', 'New session data' FROM sessions;
UPDATE sessions SET data = 'Updated session data' WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'open';
SELECT s1.data FROM sessions s1 WHERE s1.id IN (SELECT id FROM sessions WHERE status = 'open') ORDER BY s1.data DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT s.id, s.data FROM sessions s WHERE s.status LIKE 'o%';
SELECT s1.id FROM sessions s1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sessions s2 WHERE s2.status = 'closed' AND s2.id = s1.id);
